query:
SELECT CONCAT(
  'WorkDate:', DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d'),
  ' | CheckIn:', DATE_FORMAT(check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),
  ' | CheckOut:', DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),
  ' | WorkedMins:', worked_minutes,
  ' | FinMins:', financial_minutes,
  ' | Base:', base_salary,
  ' | LatePen:', late_penalty,
  ' | Net:', net_salary,
  ' | LateMins:', late_minutes,
  ' | EarlyMins:', early_leave_minutes
) as info
FROM worker_daily_finance 
WHERE worker_id = 180104
ORDER BY work_date;
